title: Cobblemon Weather Accurate Battles
description: This mod adds weather accuracy in your battles.
body:
### Weather Accurate Battles This immersive and lightweight mod connects Minecraft’s natural weather directly to your Cobblemon battles. It also adds visual weather effects when Pokémon use weather-based moves or abilities. ![Pokeball with lasers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126a4e2e7b9eaf32235715201c29d14eb82d41d8.gif) ### 🌧️ Real Minecraft Weather in Cobblemon Battles Minecraft’s weather now directly affects your battles. If it's raining, snowing, or if theres a sandstorm in the overworld, your battle will reflect that same weather condition. When a Pokémon uses a weather ability or move, it temporarily overrides the current Minecraft weather and uses this mod for the weather effects! Once the battle ends, the weather returns to whatever the world’s global weather currently is.
![pokeball with rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c02dd3ec59c161b7094a4843424eaf4c4705ea48.gif) **Natural weather can be your best ally, or worst enemy! Choose your battles carefully!** ![pokeball with rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c02dd3ec59c161b7094a4843424eaf4c4705ea48.gif)
### Battle Accurate Weather Visual weather effects play when Pokémon use moves or abilities like Drizzle, Rain Dance, Sand Stream, Sand Spit, Snow Warning, Snowscape and more! These effects are local to the battle and will not change the world’s global weather. By default the effect radius is 32 blocks, but this can be changed in the config folder.
![Pokeball with snow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe40e2bb68ae26707f591d9c28c96fd644053111.gif) ![Sobble Battling Grookey in a clear terrain with rainy weather in the jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf94e02aa317aa4475939ddabacdbfa0f0c14b1d.jpeg) ![Pokeball with snow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe40e2bb68ae26707f591d9c28c96fd644053111.gif)
### Features **🌧️ Minecraft weather now visually appears during battles** **❄️ Rain and snow from the overworld now affect battles** **🏜️ Sandstorm visuals appear when using moves and abilities that activate Sandstorm. Sandstorms now appear in the Desert, and Badlands** **☀️ Savannas now have Harsh Sunlight as the default weather** **⚡ Dynamax moves that affect weather call weather effects** **🔒 Weather moves and abilities lock the battle weather** **🔄 After the battle ends, the weather returns to the current world state** ![pokeball with sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0b8d1f8f45c0823b940e6b79642854a9fd060f.gif)
### Recommended Setup For the best experience, use shaders. ### Shaders: • Allium • Bloop • BSL • Complementary Reimagined • Solas Shader • ### Mods: • Physics Mod •
![pokeball with sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0b8d1f8f45c0823b940e6b79642854a9fd060f.gif)
### Compatibility At the moment I'm not aware of any compatibility issues with other mods. As always, make a backup of your world if you're unsure. *This mod was made specifically for Singleplayer and LAN. Im unsure of how well it will behave in a server. It MUST be installed on both the server and all clients. It will not function on servers where the mod is not installed server-side.
![Pokeball with lasers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126a4e2e7b9eaf32235715201c29d14eb82d41d8.gif)
